basic_details.job_title: VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Safdarjung Hospital
basic_details.short_information: Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Safdarjung Hospital has released the official Office Assistant Notification 2026. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a Graduate Degree and up to 30 years of age can attend the walk-in interview on 09 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are provided below.

qualification.details: Office Assistant (Cardiology department): Graduate Degree (in any field) Ability to read, write, communicate, and type in English Ability to use Microsoft Excel, Word and PowerPoint Ability to communicate, read and write in the local language Experience in data collection, data analysis, data monitoring etc. may be given preference.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

all_official_links.label: Download VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview
VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.text: Office Assistant (Cardiology department): Graduate Degree (in any field) Ability to read, write, communicate, and type in English Ability to use Microsoft Excel, Word and PowerPoint Ability to communicate, read and write in the local language Experience in data collection, data analysis, data monitoring etc. may be given preference.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: VMMC Safdarjung Hospital Office Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Office Assistant in the Cardiology department at Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Safdarjung Hospital.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Office Assistant post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate Degree in any field and possess good communication and typing skills in English and the local language, along with proficiency in MS Office.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Office Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Office Assistant position is up to 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Office Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is through a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 09 July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Vardhman Mahavir Medical College Safdarjung Hospital, New Delhi - 110029.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: While not strictly mandatory, experience in data collection, data analysis, and data monitoring is preferred and may be given preference.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of relevant certificates, and recent passport-size photographs.
